description: Open the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and apply a Chromatic Aberration (RGB Shift) effect. Shift the Red channel horizontally to the right relative to the Green and Blue channels to create a misaligned 3D anaglyph or glitch effect. Render 12 frames of the sequence as PNG files to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/aberration/.
